====Pokémon====
This listing is for Glacia's Pokémon in the Pokémon Adventures manga.

=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Glacia
|pkmn=Glalie
|gender=male
|type1=Ice
|img=Glacia Glalie Adventures.png
|img_size=176px
|epnum=PS251
|epname=The Beginning of the End with Kyogre & Groudon XIII
|desc={{p|Glalie}} is Glacia's first known Pokémon. He was used when Glacia attempted to awaken Regice, where he provided protection from the rain by creating a circle of ice from between his horns. 

None of Glalie's moves are known, and his Ability is {{a|Inner Focus}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Glacia
|pkmn=Spheal
|type1=Ice
|type2=Water
|img=Glacia Spheal Adventures.png
|img_size=120px
|epnum=PS253
|epname=A Royal Rumble with Regirock, Regice and Registeel I
|desc={{p|Spheal}} was used along with Snorunt to open the chamber containing Regice.

None of Spheal's moves are known.}}

=====Temporary=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Glacia
|pkmn=Regice
|type1=Ice
|img=Brandon Regice Adventures.png
|img_size=120px
|epnum=PS254
|epname=A Royal Rumble with Regirock, Regice and Registeel II
|main=Brandon's legendary giants
|main_section=Pokémon Adventures
|desc={{p|Regice}} was awakened by Steven and the Elite Four to be used to contain Groudon and Kyogre's power. Glacia controlled Regice with Phoebe while the others controlled Regirock and Registeel. After Steven died from the strain of controlling the three Pokémon, Regice lashed out and ran away. It was later found by [[Brandon]] and captured.}}
